actionability.invalidation_description: Magnet effect fails if price reverses before reaching 16000.0

time_decay_impact.note: Non-0DTE: minimal theta impact intraday

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to negative aggregate GEX (-0.81B), amplifying price swings
outlook.summary: Market is trapped in a short-gamma trap below the critical 23200 resistance. Dealers are short puts, creating selling pressure on rallies and accelerating downside moves. Watch for volatility expansion.

levels.motivazione: Highest 0DTE Open Interest (642 OI) located immediately above spot. Dealers short these puts must sell futures to hedge, creating strong resistance.
Significant Put Open Interest alignment across 0DTE, Weekly, and Monthly expiries. Acts as a structural support floor in a negative gamma environment.
Dominant Call Open Interest in Weekly (471) and Monthly (403) expiries. Marks the upper bound of the trading range and major dealer hedging cap.
Massive Monthly Put OI (1471). With spot well below, this acts as a gravitational magnet and overhead resistance for any recovery attempts.
Calculated Max Pain for 0DTE is significantly above spot. This acts as a distant magnetic target for Market Makers to expire options worthless.
